---
title: "Top-30 Sensitivity Analysis Across Groups 1-4"
author: "Simar Jawanda"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "png",
  fig.ext = "png",
  dpi = 300
)
```

# Step 1: Load Packages

```{r}
Sys.setenv(
  PATH = paste("/opt/homebrew/bin", Sys.getenv("PATH"), sep = ":"),
  FC = "/opt/homebrew/bin/gfortran",
  F77 = "/opt/homebrew/bin/gfortran",
  F90 = "/opt/homebrew/bin/gfortran"
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(coin)
library(lefser)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
```

# Step 2: Define Helper Functions

```{r}
run_genus_pca <- function(genus_merged_df, metadata_cols, top_n = 30) {
  genus_abundance_only <- genus_merged_df %>%
    select(-all_of(metadata_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

  keep_genus <- vapply(
    genus_abundance_only,
    function(values) {
      sum(!is.na(values)) > 1 && sd(values, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
    },
    logical(1)
  )

  genus_abundance_filtered <- genus_abundance_only[, keep_genus, drop = FALSE]

  pca_obj <- prcomp(genus_abundance_filtered, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

  variance_explained <- (pca_obj$sdev^2) / sum(pca_obj$sdev^2)
  variance_df <- tibble(
    PC = paste0("PC", seq_along(variance_explained)),
    variance_explained = variance_explained,
    cumulative_variance = cumsum(variance_explained)
  )

  loading_pc_count <- min(5, ncol(pca_obj$rotation))
  loading_weights <- variance_explained[seq_len(loading_pc_count)]
  loadings_matrix <- pca_obj$rotation[, seq_len(loading_pc_count), drop = FALSE]
  weighted_loading <- rowSums(abs(sweep(loadings_matrix, 2, loading_weights, `*`)))

  loadings_df <- as.data.frame(loadings_matrix) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Genus") %>%
    mutate(weighted_loading = weighted_loading[Genus]) %>%
    arrange(desc(weighted_loading))

  top_genera_df <- loadings_df %>%
    slice_head(n = min(top_n, nrow(loadings_df)))

  filtered_table <- genus_merged_df %>%
    select(all_of(metadata_cols), all_of(top_genera_df$Genus))

  list(
    variance_df = variance_df,
    loadings_df = loadings_df,
    top_genera_df = top_genera_df,
    filtered_table = filtered_table
  )
}

run_mann_whitney_results <- function(filtered_df) {
  abundance_only <- filtered_df %>%
    select(-Run, -group_simple, -psnp_size, -accession_number)

  results_raw <- bind_rows(
    lapply(
      colnames(abundance_only),
      function(genus_name) {
        test_df <- tibble(
          group_simple = factor(filtered_df$group_simple, levels = c("control", "psnp")),
          abundance = as.numeric(abundance_only[[genus_name]])
        )

        test <- wilcox.test(abundance ~ group_simple, data = test_df, exact = FALSE)

        tibble(
          Genus = genus_name,
          p_value = unname(test$p.value)
        )
      }
    )
  ) %>%
    arrange(p_value)

  results_fdr <- results_raw %>%
    mutate(q_value = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

  list(raw = results_raw, fdr = results_fdr)
}

run_stratified_results <- function(filtered_df) {
  abundance_only <- filtered_df %>%
    select(-Run, -group_simple, -psnp_size, -accession_number)

  results_raw <- bind_rows(
    lapply(
      colnames(abundance_only),
      function(genus_name) {
        test_df <- tibble(
          accession_number = factor(filtered_df$accession_number, levels = c("PRJNA944557", "PRJNA1357312")),
          group_simple = factor(filtered_df$group_simple, levels = c("control", "psnp")),
          abundance = as.numeric(abundance_only[[genus_name]])
        )

        stratified_test <- coin::wilcox_test(
          abundance ~ group_simple | accession_number,
          data = test_df,
          distribution = "asymptotic"
        )

        tibble(
          Genus = genus_name,
          p_value = as.numeric(coin::pvalue(stratified_test))
        )
      }
    )
  ) %>%
    arrange(p_value)

  results_fdr <- results_raw %>%
    mutate(q_value = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

  list(raw = results_raw, fdr = results_fdr)
}

run_lefse_results <- function(filtered_df, lda_threshold = 2, use_subclass = FALSE) {
  lefse_meta <- filtered_df %>%
    select(Run, group_simple, accession_number) %>%
    mutate(
      group_simple = factor(trimws(tolower(group_simple)), levels = c("control", "psnp")),
      accession_number = factor(accession_number, levels = c("PRJNA944557", "PRJNA1357312"))
    )

  lefse_genus <- filtered_df %>%
    select(-Run, -group_simple, -psnp_size, -accession_number)

  lefse_matrix <- t(as.matrix(lefse_genus))
  mode(lefse_matrix) <- "numeric"

  lefse_input <- SummarizedExperiment(
    assays = list(relative_abundance = lefse_matrix),
    colData = S4Vectors::DataFrame(lefse_meta)
  )

  if (use_subclass) {
    lefse_df <- lefser(
      lefse_input,
      classCol = "group_simple",
      subclassCol = "accession_number",
      assay = "relative_abundance",
      lda.threshold = lda_threshold,
      method = "none",
      trim.names = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    lefse_df <- lefser(
      lefse_input,
      classCol = "group_simple",
      assay = "relative_abundance",
      lda.threshold = lda_threshold,
      method = "none",
      trim.names = FALSE
    )
  }

  lefse_df <- as.data.frame(lefse_df)

  if (nrow(lefse_df) > 0) {
    colnames(lefse_df) <- c("Genus", "LDA_score")
    lefse_df <- lefse_df %>%
      arrange(desc(LDA_score))
  } else {
    lefse_df <- tibble(
      Genus = character(),
      LDA_score = numeric()
    )
  }

  lefse_df
}
```

# Step 3: Define Group Paths

```{r}
output_root <- "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/R Analysis/Top30 Sensitivity Outputs"
dir.create(output_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

group_specs <- list(
  list(
    label = "Group 1",
    short = "group1",
    metadata_csv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/R Analysis/Group_1_outputs/group1_analysis_metadata.csv",
    genus_tsv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/QIIME2 DATA/Group_1_PRJNA1209429/exported-genus-relfreq/genus-relfreq.tsv",
    output_dir = file.path(output_root, "Group_1"),
    use_subclass = FALSE
  ),
  list(
    label = "Group 2",
    short = "group2",
    metadata_csv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/R Analysis/Group 2 Outputs/group2_analysis_metadata.csv",
    genus_tsv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/QIIME2 DATA/Group 2/exported-genus-relfreq/genus-relfreq.tsv",
    output_dir = file.path(output_root, "Group_2"),
    use_subclass = TRUE
  ),
  list(
    label = "Group 3",
    short = "group3",
    metadata_csv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/R Analysis/Group 3 Outputs/group3_analysis_metadata.csv",
    genus_tsv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/QIIME2 DATA/Group_3_PRJNA831840/exported-genus-relfreq/genus-relfreq.tsv",
    output_dir = file.path(output_root, "Group_3"),
    use_subclass = FALSE
  ),
  list(
    label = "Group 4",
    short = "group4",
    metadata_csv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/R Analysis/Group 4 Outputs/group4_analysis_metadata.csv",
    genus_tsv = "/Users/simarjawanda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UBC/QIIME2 DATA/Group 4_PRJNA1060792/exported-genus-relfreq/genus-relfreq.tsv",
    output_dir = file.path(output_root, "Group_4"),
    use_subclass = FALSE
  )
)
```

# Step 4: Run the Top-30 Sensitivity Workflow

```{r}
top30_summary_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(
    group_specs,
    function(spec) {
      dir.create(spec$output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

      metadata_df <- read.csv(spec$metadata_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      genus_df <- read.delim(spec$genus_tsv, check.names = FALSE, skip = 1)

      rownames(genus_df) <- genus_df[[1]]
      genus_df <- genus_df[, -1, drop = FALSE]

      genus_matrix_t <- as.data.frame(t(genus_df))
      genus_matrix_t$Run <- rownames(genus_matrix_t)
      rownames(genus_matrix_t) <- NULL

      genus_merged_df <- metadata_df %>%
        inner_join(genus_matrix_t, by = "Run")

      metadata_cols <- c("Run", "group_simple", "psnp_size", "accession_number")
      pca_res <- run_genus_pca(genus_merged_df, metadata_cols, top_n = 30)

      mann_whitney_res <- run_mann_whitney_results(pca_res$filtered_table)

      write.csv(pca_res$variance_df, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_pca_variance_explained_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(pca_res$loadings_df, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_pca_genus_loadings_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(pca_res$top_genera_df, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_pca_top30_genera.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(pca_res$filtered_table, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_genus_filtered_top30_for_sensitivity.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(mann_whitney_res$raw, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_genus_level_mann_whitney_raw_p_values_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(mann_whitney_res$fdr, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_genus_level_mann_whitney_fdr_results_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

      lefse_lda1_df <- run_lefse_results(pca_res$filtered_table, lda_threshold = 1, use_subclass = spec$use_subclass)
      lefse_lda2_df <- run_lefse_results(pca_res$filtered_table, lda_threshold = 2, use_subclass = spec$use_subclass)

      write.csv(lefse_lda1_df, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_results_LDA1_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(lefse_lda2_df, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_results_LDA2_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

      lefse_compare_lda1 <- mann_whitney_res$fdr %>%
        mutate(
          Found_by_LEfSe_LDA1 = Genus %in% lefse_lda1_df$Genus,
          LEfSe_LDA1_score = lefse_lda1_df$LDA_score[match(Genus, lefse_lda1_df$Genus)],
          FDR_significant = q_value < 0.05
        ) %>%
        arrange(p_value)

      lefse_compare_lda2 <- mann_whitney_res$fdr %>%
        mutate(
          Found_by_LEfSe_LDA2 = Genus %in% lefse_lda2_df$Genus,
          LEfSe_LDA2_score = lefse_lda2_df$LDA_score[match(Genus, lefse_lda2_df$Genus)],
          FDR_significant = q_value < 0.05
        ) %>%
        arrange(p_value)

      write.csv(lefse_compare_lda1, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_vs_mann_whitney_top30_comparison_LDA1.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
      write.csv(lefse_compare_lda2, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_vs_mann_whitney_top30_comparison_LDA2.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

      if (spec$use_subclass) {
        stratified_res <- run_stratified_results(pca_res$filtered_table)

        write.csv(stratified_res$raw, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_genus_level_stratified_wilcoxon_raw_p_values_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
        write.csv(stratified_res$fdr, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_genus_level_stratified_wilcoxon_fdr_results_top30.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

        strat_compare_lda1 <- stratified_res$fdr %>%
          mutate(
            Found_by_LEfSe_LDA1 = Genus %in% lefse_lda1_df$Genus,
            LEfSe_LDA1_score = lefse_lda1_df$LDA_score[match(Genus, lefse_lda1_df$Genus)],
            FDR_significant = q_value < 0.05
          ) %>%
          arrange(p_value)

        strat_compare_lda2 <- stratified_res$fdr %>%
          mutate(
            Found_by_LEfSe_LDA2 = Genus %in% lefse_lda2_df$Genus,
            LEfSe_LDA2_score = lefse_lda2_df$LDA_score[match(Genus, lefse_lda2_df$Genus)],
            FDR_significant = q_value < 0.05
          ) %>%
          arrange(p_value)

        write.csv(strat_compare_lda1, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_vs_stratified_wilcoxon_top30_comparison_LDA1.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
        write.csv(strat_compare_lda2, file.path(spec$output_dir, paste0(spec$short, "_lefse_vs_stratified_wilcoxon_top30_comparison_LDA2.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

        tibble(
          Group = spec$label,
          tested_genera = nrow(mann_whitney_res$fdr),
          raw_significant_unadjusted = sum(mann_whitney_res$fdr$p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          fdr_significant_unadjusted = sum(mann_whitney_res$fdr$q_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          raw_significant_stratified = sum(stratified_res$fdr$p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          fdr_significant_stratified = sum(stratified_res$fdr$q_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          lefse_hits_lda1 = nrow(lefse_lda1_df),
          lefse_hits_lda2 = nrow(lefse_lda2_df)
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          Group = spec$label,
          tested_genera = nrow(mann_whitney_res$fdr),
          raw_significant_unadjusted = sum(mann_whitney_res$fdr$p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          fdr_significant_unadjusted = sum(mann_whitney_res$fdr$q_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
          raw_significant_stratified = NA_integer_,
          fdr_significant_stratified = NA_integer_,
          lefse_hits_lda1 = nrow(lefse_lda1_df),
          lefse_hits_lda2 = nrow(lefse_lda2_df)
        )
      }
    }
  )
)

top30_summary_df
```

# Step 5: Save the Top-30 Summary

```{r}
write.csv(
  top30_summary_df,
  file.path(output_root, "top30_summary_by_group.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

This separate notebook keeps the top-30 workflow independent from the main analysis so it can be used as a sensitivity check when explaining why the final thesis uses the top-50 genus threshold.
